chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: Hi. This is Ria calling from the insurer about your policy renewal.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: I already told the last agent I'm not interested.

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: I understand. I just wanted to quickly confirm your renewal date.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: This is such a hassle. I've been called three times this month already.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: Honestly, it's getting annoying. Can you people stop calling me?

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: I'm sorry for the repeated calls. Let me note that down.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: This is ridiculous. I want to speak to someone else.

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: Understood. I'll arrange a callback from a specialist right away.
